title: Repurposed Structures - Better Ocean Monuments Compat Port
description: TelepathicGrunt’s Repurposed Structures - Better Ocean Monuments Compat Datapack ported to Forge, NeoForge, Fabric and Quilt!
body:
# What is Repurposed Structures - Better Ocean Monuments Compat (Port)?
While yes, its name is rather a mouthful, Repurposed Structures - Better Ocean Monuments Compat (Port) simply turns [TelepathicGrunt](https://modrinth.com/user/TelepathicGrunt)'s Repurposed Structures - Better Ocean Monuments Compat, and porta it to **Forge, Neoforge, Fabric,** and **Quilt,** for either Modpacks, or simply people who prefer Mods to Datapacks.
> The base structure is not my work, but I did convert the Datapack to a Mod.

# Dependencies
## General Dependancies (Required for Any Version)
Required Dependencies include [**Cloth Config API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config), and [**Midnightlib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib), and of course Yung's Better Ocean Monuments and Repurposed Structures.
## For Fabric
Dependencies include [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), and the Fabric version of [**Yung's Better Ocean Monuments**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-ocean-monuments), and the Fabric/Quilt version of [**Repurposed Structures**](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric).


![Outside of the Desert Monument (Acquired from the original project)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b635718d2411cc18b7667e617c182ffb44381c0f.png)

> Check out the [**Original Project**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/repurposed-structures-better-ocean-monuments-compat) by [**TelepathicGrunt**](https://modrinth.com/user/TelepathicGrunt)!
